title: Implement homepage content block (name, bio, Projects, list)
description: Replace index route with simple block: Alex Russell (name), bio paragraph, 'Projects' heading, projects list. Use 2 font sizes only.

steps.details: Edit lib/src/routes/index.tsx. Remove template content. Add name, bio, Projects heading, map over projects from content.
Name and 'Projects': text-3xl or similar (display). Bio and list: text-base (body). Use CSS variables for color.
Run dev, check content renders. Confirm only 2 sizes. Screenshot for UI verification.

technicalNotes: Bio content can be placeholder; user will replace
